artifacts.reason: Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-multi-search-engine`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Run web, multi-source, or last-30-days research through AIsa. Use when: the user needs search, synthesis, competitor scans, or trend discovery. Supports research-ready outputs and structured retrieval.
